summary: Completed testing of Modifier System Bug Fix. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed: Modificadores tab in Settings shows groups with options, Product Edit 'Asignar Grupo de Preguntas' dropdown is populated with 7 modifier groups, and modifier assignments persist correctly after save.

issues: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (a11y warning)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/modifier-groups-with-options correctly returns combined old-style and new-style groups with enriched options
GET /api/modifier-groups returns flat list from modifier_groups collection (new-style groups)
GET /api/modifiers returns flat list of options with group_id field
POST /api/modifiers correctly creates options with group_id linkage
Frontend ProductConfig.js properly fetches from /api/modifier-groups-with-options for dropdown
Frontend InventarioTab.js properly loads from /api/modifier-groups + /api/modifiers for settings view
seed_data_creation: Assigned Temperatura modifier group to HAMBURGUESA product for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modifier system bug fix verified. Three endpoint separation working: (1) /api/modifier-groups-with-options for ProductConfig dropdown (combined groups with enriched options), (2) /api/modifier-groups for flat group list (new-style), (3) /api/modifiers for flat options list. Existing modifier groups: Punto de Coccion (4 options), Extras (4 options), Acompanantes (5 options), Sin... (4 options), Test (0 options), Temperatura (5 options), SIN (2 options). HAMBURGUESA product now has Temperatura modifier assignment.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/modifier-groups-with-options: PASS - Returns 8 groups with enriched options array
backend_endpoints.GET /api/modifiers: PASS - Returns 7 options with group_id field
backend_endpoints.POST /api/modifier-groups: PASS - Creates new group with name, min/max_selection
backend_endpoints.POST /api/modifiers: PASS - Creates option with group_id, name, price linkage

frontend_ui.Settings > Configuración Productos > Mod: PASS - Shows groups (Temperatura, SIN) with their options
frontend_ui.Product Edit > Asignar Modificadores tab: PASS - Empty state with Agregar button
frontend_ui.Asignar Grupo de Preguntas dropdown: PASS - Populated with 7 groups (was empty before fix)
frontend_ui.Modifier assignment workflow: PASS - Select group → set min/max → click AGREGAR GRUPO
frontend_ui.Assignment persistence: PASS - Temperatura shows after save and page reload

data_persistence.Modifier options linked to groups via gr: PASS - Options correctly reference parent group
